name: CEDS Finance
description_short: CEDS Finance is a credit repair provider based in Aurora, Colorado. Rated 4.4/5 on Google.
description_long:
CEDS Finance is a credit repair provider serving clients in Aurora, Colorado. The company serves consumers in the Aurora area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

CEDS Finance specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Aurora, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. CEDS Finance operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Aurora, Colorado area who are considering CEDS Finance should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
